focus: React render performance, Date allocations, context re-renders, useEffect cleanup

findings.title: SettingsContext.Provider value is not memoized
findings.description: The SettingsContext.Provider value is an inline object literal `{ settings, loaded, updateSetting }`. Every render of SettingsProvider creates a new object reference, causing all consumers of useGeneralSettings() to re-render. This context is consumed pervasively (TaskItem, Sidebar, views, etc.).
findings.suggestion: Wrap the value in useMemo with [settings, loaded, updateSetting] as deps. updateSetting is already stable (useCallback with []).

findings.title: TaskItem creates two new Date() objects every render for overdue check
findings.description: `new Date(task.dueDate) < new Date()` is evaluated on every render of every TaskItem. In a list of 100 tasks, this creates 200 Date objects per render cycle. The parent view (Today, Upcoming) already computes today's date key.
findings.suggestion: Accept a `todayISO` string prop from the parent and compare `task.dueDate < todayISO` as a string comparison, or compute `isOverdue` in the parent and pass it down.

findings.title: Board.tsx DraggableCard creates two new Date() per render for overdue check
findings.description: Same pattern as PERF-402: `new Date(task.dueDate) < new Date()` inside a card component rendered per task. Board view can have many cards.
findings.suggestion: Compute a todayISO string once at the Board level and pass it down, or use string comparison.

findings.title: ChatTaskResults creates new Date() per task row on every render
findings.description: formatDueLabel() creates `new Date()` on line 19, and the task list map creates `new Date()` on line 90 for each task. Both are in the render path.
findings.suggestion: Compute `today` once outside the component or memoize it.

findings.title: DateFields.tsx creates two new Date() in render for deadline overdue styling
findings.description: `new Date(task.deadline) < new Date()` in JSX className expression. Also `new Date(task.deadline)` on line 91 for toLocaleDateString. Three Date allocations per render.
findings.suggestion: Compute the parsed deadline and isOverdue flag before the return statement.

findings.title: FocusMode.tsx creates two new Date() in JSX for overdue check
findings.description: `new Date(currentTask.dueDate) < new Date()` inline in JSX className.
findings.suggestion: Compute isOverdue in a variable before the return.

findings.title: Today.tsx calls new Date() in render path and in JSX conditional
findings.description: Line 59: `toDateKey(new Date())` on every render. Line 128: `new Date(today + 'T00:00:00')` in TaskInput prop. Line 133: `new Date().getHours()` in JSX conditional. The today key and defaultDueDate should be memoized since they don't change within a render.
findings.suggestion: Wrap `today` in useMemo with empty deps (or a timer-based dependency for midnight rollover). Memoize defaultDueDate.

findings.title: Stats.tsx calls multiple date-creating functions in render path without memoization
findings.description: `toDateKey(new Date())`, `getWeekStart()`, and `getLast7Days()` are all called outside useMemo. getWeekStart creates 2 Date objects, getLast7Days creates 7. These are stable for the lifetime of the component render.
findings.suggestion: Wrap these calls in useMemo with empty deps or a stable key.

findings.title: Upcoming.tsx creates new Date() and formatMonthHeader() in render path
findings.description: `formatMonthHeader()` (line 43 area, called somewhere in render) creates a new Date. `toDateKey(new Date())` on line 63 called every render.

findings.title: WelcomeScreen creates multiple new Date() objects despite being memo'd
findings.description: WelcomeScreen is wrapped in React.memo but internally calls getGreeting() (new Date), getTimeOfDay() (new Date), `new Date()` on line 106, and more in the briefing useEffect. Since memo prevents re-renders from parent, these are less critical, but the render-path allocations (lines 13, 23, 106) still happen on every internal state change.
findings.suggestion: Consolidate to a single `new Date()` call and derive hour/todayStr from it.

findings.title: Matrix.tsx creates new Date() in render path for today key
findings.description: `toDateKey(new Date())` called on every render without memoization.

findings.title: DatePicker creates new Date() on every render
findings.description: `const now = new Date()` on line 51 is in the component body (render path). Used for initial state but allocated every render.
findings.suggestion: Move into useState initializer function or useMemo.

findings.title: TaskItem creates inline style object on every render
findings.description: `style={{ ...style, ...indentPadding }}` creates a new object on every render via spread. Since TaskItem is React.memo'd, this would normally be fine, but if the parent passes a new `style` prop (e.g., from virtualization), the memo comparison already fails. The spread itself is a minor allocation.
findings.suggestion: Consider useMemo for the merged style when depth > 0.

findings.title: ThemeManager constructor adds event listener that is never removed
findings.description: ThemeManager adds a `change` listener to the system theme MediaQueryList in the constructor but never provides a way to remove it. If ThemeManager is instantiated multiple times (e.g., in tests or HMR), listeners accumulate.
findings.suggestion: Store the listener reference and add a `dispose()` method, or ensure ThemeManager is a true singleton.

findings.title: SearchModal formatDate function creates two Date objects per call in render
findings.description: The `formatDate` function is defined inside the render body (after the early return) and creates `new Date()` and `new Date()` on lines 102-103 for each task result that has a date.
findings.suggestion: Move formatDate outside the component or memoize the today/tomorrow dates.

top_priority_fixes: PERF-401: SettingsContext useMemo — broadest impact, affects nearly all components
PERF-402: TaskItem Date allocation — affects every task row in every view
PERF-407: Today.tsx date allocations — most-visited view
